zelda_timeline.title: Skyward Sword
zelda_timeline.description: The earliest story in the chronology. It depicts the forging of the Master Sword and the origins of the cycle of reincarnation.
zelda_timeline.key_event: The Goddess Hylia's plan to defeat Demise.

zelda_timeline.title: Ocarina of Time
zelda_timeline.era: Era of the Hero of Time
zelda_timeline.description: The point where the timeline splits into three distinct paths based on the outcome of the battle with Ganondorf.
zelda_timeline.key_event: Link pulls the Master Sword and travels 7 years into the future.

zelda_timeline.title: Twilight Princess
zelda_timeline.description: Takes place centuries after the Child Ending of Ocarina of Time. Hyrule is threatened by the invasion of the Twilight Realm.
zelda_timeline.key_event: The execution of Ganondorf and his banishment to the Twilight.
